final:
module matrix_multiplier (
    input [7:0] A00, A01, A10, A11,
    input [7:0] B00, B01, B10, B11,
    output [15:0] C00, C01, C10, C11
);
    wire resultant_matrix = A00 * B00 + A01 * B10;
    assign C00 = resultant_matrix;  // C[0][0]
    assign C01 = A00 * B01 + A01 * B11;  // C[0][1]
    assign C10 = A10 * B00 + A11 * B10;  // C[1][0]
    assign C11 = A10 * B01 + A11 * B11;  // C[1][1]
endmodule
